fixes_applied.description: Replaced non-existent GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription(page) method with inline Rails Admin operations. Added code to navigate to subscription edit page, select 'paused' state from dropdown, and save changes.
Combined 2 log lines in Step 10 into 1 concise log statement: 'Step 10: Simulated printing 6 pages and verified display'
Combined 2 log lines in Step 12 into 1 concise log statement: 'Step 12: Additional print job registered - 15 pages printed total'

Updated tooltip selectors to use compound selectors with data-testid first and role='tooltip' as fallback for better specificity: '[data-testid='complimentary-pages-tooltip'], [role='tooltip']' and '[data-testid='additional-pages-tooltip'], [role='tooltip']'
Scorer marked as NO_FIX_NEEDED after re-evaluation. Changed .not_to_be_visible() to .to_be_hidden() for idiomatic Playwright pattern.
fixes_applied.reason: Applied as preventive fix even though marked NO_FIX_NEEDED to ensure best practices

The test script now uses inline Rails Admin operations instead of non-existent helper method, has consolidated logging per step, and page additions use compound selectors for tooltips with proper fallback patterns.
